The '''Assault Transport''' was a troop [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].<ref name="SWRvg" />

==Characteristics==
The Assault Transport was a large troop carrier that was armed with multiple [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], had stronger shields than a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] and a relatively fast [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. It could carry up to a [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] of troops for the purpose of occupying a [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="SWRvg" />

{{Ship-stub}}
